name: Dragons
teaser: Play minions and play-on-base actions that manipulate their bases to make them unattractive for other players.
mechanics: Play minions and play-on-base actions that manipulate their bases to make them unattractive for other players.

name: Mythic Greeks
teaser: Get power boosts each time you play an action.
mechanics: Get power boosts each time you play an action.

name: Sharks
teaser: Move around and destroy weaker minions to get +1 power counters and extra minion plays.
mechanics: Move around and destroy weaker minions to get +1 power counters and extra minion plays.

name: Superheroes
teaser: Protect your minions from destruction and morph your weak minions into power-5-or-more minions.
mechanics: Protect your minions from destruction and morph your weak minions into power-5-or-more minions.

name: Tornados
teaser: Move all minions, move your own minions, move other players' minions, even during base scoring.
mechanics: Move all minions, move your own minions, move other players' minions, even during base scoring.
